name: webtalk_add_data
short_description: Internal task add data to the Webtalk manager's data model.
full_help:
webtalk_add_data

Description: 
Internal task add data to the Webtalk manager's data model.

Syntax: 
webtalk_add_data  -client <arg> [-context <arg>] -key <arg> [-value <arg>]
                  [-desc <arg>] [-html <arg>] [-quiet] [-verbose]

Usage: 
  Name        Description
  -----------------------
  -client     string value that is the client name. Must have been registered
              via webtalk_register_client.
  [-context]  string value that is the context for the data.
              Default: empty
  -key        string value that is the key for the data.
  [-value]    string value that is the value for the data.
              Default: empty
  [-desc]     string value that is the description for the data.
              Default: empty
  [-html]     string value that is the html tag for the data.
              Default: empty
  [-quiet]    Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]  Suspend message limits during command execution

Categories:

arguments.description: string value that is the client name. Must have been registered via webtalk_register_client.
string value that is the context for the data. Default: empty
